records.display_name: DOT stationary bus lane camera system

payload.description: Fixed-location camera system with two cameras per location: one license plate camera and one wide-angle street view camera. Mounted above bus lanes, often approaching right turn locations. Captures driving in bus lane violations.

records.raw_text: Two cameras mounted above the bus lane. One camera provides a high-quality view of the rear of a vehicle, clearly showing the vehicle's license plate. The second camera provides a wider-angle view of the street.

records.display_name: MTA ABLE on-bus mobile camera system

payload.description: On-bus mobile camera system. Equipment inside bus captures rear license plates of stopped vehicles, uses GPS to mark location. Two buses must observe same vehicle at same GPS location at least 5 minutes apart to issue violation. Records no standing and no parking violations.

records.raw_text: Equipment installed inside of the bus that can capture the rear license plates of vehicles stopped in the bus lane as the bus passes the vehicle. It then uses GPS to mark that location.
